mapper.sql: id, provider_code, market_code, trade_date, snapshot_type, snapshot_bucket_time, snapshot_time, item_count, rising_count, falling_count, flat_count, leader_sector_id, leader_sector_name, leader_change_rate, laggard_sector_id, laggard_sector_name, laggard_change_rate, quality_status, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO market_sector_ranking_batch (provider_code, market_code, trade_date, snapshot_type, snapshot_bucket_time, snapshot_time, item_count, rising_count, falling_count, flat_count, leader_sector_id, leader_sector_name, leader_change_rate, laggard_sector_id, laggard_sector_name, laggard_change_rate, quality_status) VALUES (#{providerCode}, #{marketCode}, #{tradeDate}, #{snapshotType}, #{snapshotBucketTime}, #{snapshotTime}, #{itemCount}, #{risingCount}, #{fallingCount}, #{flatCount}, #{leaderSectorId}, #{leaderSectorName}, #{leaderChangeRate}, #{laggardSectorId}, #{laggardSectorName}, #{laggardChangeRate}, #{qualityStatus})
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM market_sector_ranking_batch
ORDER BY snapshot_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
